sagemaker.modelcard.function.Condition.Description: An optional description of any conditions of your objective function metric.

sagemaker.modelcard.function.Facet.Description: The metric of the model's objective function. For example, *loss* or *rmse*. The following list shows examples of the values that you can specify for the metric:  + `ACCURACY`+ `AUC`+ `LOSS`+ `MAE`+ `RMSE`

sagemaker.modelcard.function.Function.Description: The optimization direction of the model's objective function. You must specify one of the following values:  + `Maximize`+ `Minimize`
